GOTS: Global Organic Textile Standard - Ensures organic status of textiles from harvesting to manufacturing.
Fair Trade: Guarantees fair wages, safe working conditions, and sustainable livelihoods.
B-Corp: Certified for high social and environmental performance standards.
EcoCert: Highest-tier organic certification organization for cosmetics and food.
FSC: Forest Stewardship Council - Ensures products come from responsibly managed forests.
USDA Organic: Meets federal guidelines for soil quality, animal raising practices, and pest control.
